content:
We'll be reaching out to our selected volunteers through Discord. We've saved your Discord IDs from the form specifically for this reason.

We have a lot of applications to go through (THANK YOU SO MUCH! We really didn't expect this), and it will take us some time to sort through them all.  
We really appreciate your patience while we get this organized. Also, please know that the application is open indefinitely, so there's no deadline to worry about.
thread_title: Call for Community Volunteer Translators: Applications Open!

content: Thank you for your reply, have a nice day ☺️
thread_title: Call for Community Volunteer Translators: Applications Open!
